title: ADR doc front-matter
description: YAML front matter for files under docs/adr/. NNNN-*.md files are decisions (kind: decision); the directory README is a reference index (kind: reference). Validated by scripts/check_frontmatter.py.

status.description: Decision lifecycle state. Required when kind: decision.

date.description: Date the decision was accepted (ISO 8601). Required when kind: decision.

deciders.description: GitHub handles of the deciders. Required when kind: decision.
